answer.text:
Nate likes turtles because they are unique, low-maintenance, calming, and their slow pace offers a relaxing change from everyday stress. They bring him peace and joy, have big personalities, and he finds them cute—especially when eating fruit.

- “They're unique and their slow pace is a nice change from the rush of life. They're also low-maintenance and calming.” (2022-03-18T19:01:30)
- “Turtles really bring me joy and peace.” (2022-11-09T18:06:00)
- “They always bring me peace in the craziness of life.” (2022-11-11T00:08:30)
- “I'm not sure I'll ever understand why watching my turtles slowly walk around makes me so happy. But I'm very glad it does.” (2022-10-21T14:05:00)
- “The turtles might be small, but both sure have big personalities. I really reccomend having something like these little guys for times of stress.” (2022-01-23T14:07:30)
- “I love seeing them eat fruit - they get so hyped and it's so cute!” (2022-10-25T20:26:00)
